text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Terus, terus, Kaichou bikin
lawakan baru lagi……

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Aku jadi keinget lagi sama lawakan Kaichou-san yang kemarin…… Hahaha.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Eeeh!? Kamu masih ketawa gara-gara itu!?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Abisnya, 'Teio yang berteio-teio'
itu konteksnya gimana…… Ahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Haaah~~. Lawakan Kaichou-san itu
entah kenapa nempel banget di aku~.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: A-Aku sama sekali nggak paham deh…….
